Describe the visual changes in the title sequence from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a blue-skinned character sits in lotus position with 'patch paradise' text below; at 6s, the text updates to 'patch parables' and displays 'The Parable of Good or Bad'; at 8s, the title scene disappears completely from view.

question: Describe the sequence of interactions and movements involving the figures and animals.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a yellow figure stands behind a fence with 'OOPS...' text nearby; at 14s, a purple figure places a hand on the yellow figure's shoulder with 'There There' text; at 18s, a small brown animal runs across the grass near the fence.
